creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/7/zfsprops.7.html#userused> appears OK. 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfsprops&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+13.2-RELEASE> for 13.2-RELEASE (FreeBSD 13.0, July 21, 2022) appears OK. 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfsprops&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+13.2-STABLE> for 13.2-STABLE (FreeBSD 13.0, July 21, 2022) appears OK. 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfsprops&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-CURRENT> for 14.0-CURRENT (FreeBSD 13.0, July 21, 2022) is bugged.
